description: A fire alarm is activated in the hotel. The security or front office staff must execute the emergency response procedure.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the fire alarm alert from the main panel, identifying the zone where it was triggered.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the alarm is from the 3rd-floor kitchen.
Agent successfully calls 911 and reports the alarm.

nodes.task_description: Make a calm, clear announcement over the hotel's PA system instructing guests to evacuate.

expected_outcome.expected: A clear evacuation message is broadcast to all guests.
